metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Trp SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Trp SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-trp
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common trp
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.trp.v20210515.models.AttrItem.Ext
documentation:
扩展字段
\:rtype: str

通用属性

    Type 的枚举值
    text:文本类型, longtext:长文本类型, banner:单图片类型, image:多图片类型, video:视频类型, mp:小程序类型

    具体组合如下
    - Type: "text" 文本类型, 对应值 Value: "文本字符串"
    - Type: "longtext" 长文本类型, 对应值 Value: "长文本字符串, 支持换行
"
    - Type: "banner" 单图片类型, 对应图片地址 Value: "https://sample.cdn.com/xxx.jpg"
    - Type: "image" 多图片类型, 对应图片地址 Values: ["https://sample.cdn.com/1.jpg", "https://sample.cdn.com/2.jpg"]
    - Type: "video" 视频类型, 对应视频地址 Value: "https://sample.cdn.com/xxx.mp4"
    - Type: "mp" 小程序类型, 对应配置 Values: ["WXAPPID", "WXAPP_PATH", "跳转说明"]

    具体组合如下
    - Type: "text" 文本类型, 对应值 Value: "文本字符串"
    - Type: "longtext" 长文本类型, 对应值 Value: "长文本字符串, 支持换行
"
    - Type: "banner" 单图片类型, 对应图片地址 Value: "https://sample.cdn.com/xxx.jpg"
    - Type: "image" 多图片类型, 对应图片地址 Values: ["https://sample.cdn.com/1.jpg", "https://sample.cdn.com/2.jpg"]
    - Type: "video" 视频类型, 对应视频地址 Value: "https://sample.cdn.com/xxx.mp4"
    - Type: "mp" 小程序类型, 对应配置 Values: ["WXAPPID", "WXAPP_PATH", "跳转说明"]
